name: Pickled Demon Tongue
description:
This small crystal vial contains the forked end of a demon's tongue, preserved in brine. The spell attack roll of any spell cast by Activating this item is [[/r 1d20+7 #Spell Attack Roll]]{+7}, and the spell DC is 17.

  • Armor You gain resistance 2 to acid and attacks by demons.
  • Weapon After you cast an acid spell by Activating the pickled demon tongue, your Strikes with the weapon deal an additional ] damage until end of your next turn.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You cast .
